name: flutter-mane
flavor_texts: This Pokémon has characteristics similar to those of Flutter Mane, a creature mentioned in a certain book.
It has similar features to a ghostly pterosaur that was covered in a paranormal magazine, but the two have little else in common.
text: Flutter-mane is the Paradox Pokémon. It is a ghost and fairy-type Pokémon. Abilities: protosynthesis. Base stats — HP: 55, Attack: 55, Defense: 55, Sp. Atk: 135, Sp. Def: 135, Speed: 135. Evolution line: flutter-mane. Lore: This Pokémon has characteristics similar to those of Flutter Mane, a creature mentioned in a certain book. It has similar features to a ghostly pterosaur that was covered in a paranormal magazine, but the two have little else in common.
